      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Finished well for narrow win in 1m4f classified here last month, opening her account on 15th start under all codes; soundly beaten in Wolverhampton handicap over that trip since but could plausibly have untapped potential over 2m on the Flat."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Developed into fairly useful hurdler when fitted with a visor last year, winning four times (2m4f-2m7f); didn't show a great deal in three AW novice races (8.6f-1m3f) in March but this longer trip ought to suit much better and she has the visor refitted on her Flat handicap debut; must be considered."

        "spotlight": "Belied her 50-1 odds and showed some promise with fifth of 13 at Bath (5f, good) ten days ago, shaping as if today's extra yardage will suit; sets only an ordinary standard but may show improvement."

        "edge": "-6.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Found 1m stretching him on his comeback from five months off and is entitled to improve, back in the cheekpieces last sported last July; still paying the price for his easy Epsom win last August, though, and there's not much wiggle room off this mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "King's Vanity (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Marcus Tregoning",
        "ts": "62",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "016/9-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Poet's Voice",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "50.0",
        "model_pct": "7.8%",
        "fair_odds": "12.83",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only seen once since leaving Andrew Balding 18 months ago, when well held last October; won his novice over C&D and the hood going back on should help but it's hard to know whether he's still up to this sort of mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Lunario",
        "jockey": "Robert Havlin",
        "trainer": "Luke Dace",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "1748-9",

        "dam_sire": "Dawn Approach",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "4.6%",
        "fair_odds": "21.82",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Last four wins have come in high summer, including two from the front last year for Jack Dace (rides Tiger Crusade), and he remains weighted to his best; didn't offer much on his comeback three weeks ago and an easy 7f is a bare minimum these days."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Nice run in a good-ground Curragh maiden last year; well held both handicap starts lately, but a hint of promise under quiet handling last time and yard won this two years ago; wouldn't be too quick to dismiss her."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Won here (7f) off 1lb higher in January when trained by Jane Chapple-Hyam; posted easily his most encouraging display since joining current yard when a keeping-on sixth of 13 at Southwell (1m, AW) 20 days ago; steps up in trip on a career-low mark and must come into consideration."

  {
    "course": "Naas",
    "time": "19:15",
    "race_name": "Anglesey Lodge Equine Hospital Woodlands Stakes (Listed Race)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "5f",
    "going": "Good To Yielding",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "low",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Getreadytorumble (GB)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "95",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "32213-",
        "sire": "Rumble Inthejungle",
        "dam_sire": "Winker Watson",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "65.5",
        "model_pct": "11.7%",
        "fair_odds": "8.52",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "British raider from a yard that has started the season strongly; highly progressive last year, winning a maiden and two handicaps before a close third in the Listed Rous Stakes at Ascot (5f, soft); ground-versatile and, while he has a bit to find on paper, can't be dismissed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Mission Central (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "108",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "110",
        "form": "11610-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Zoffany",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "64.6",
        "model_pct": "10.9%",
        "fair_odds": "9.19",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-7.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3yo won three of six starts as a juvenile, including a Group 3 at the Curragh (6f, gd-yld) and a valuable conditions race at Ascot (6f, good); struggled when dropped to 5f at the Breeders' Cup, extending his record to 0-3 at the minimum trip; entitled to be thereabouts on ratings, but others make more appeal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Fahrenheit Seven",
        "jockey": "Ben Coen",
        "trainer": "Robert Cowell",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "119",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "410-11",
        "sire": "Showcasing",
        "dam_sire": "Foxwedge",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "62.7",
        "model_pct": "9.4%",
        "fair_odds": "10.67",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "British raider arrives in terrific form having won back-to-back 5f AW handicaps at Newcastle off 92 and Southwell off 99; effective on good ground; probably needs to improve again on first run in Listed company, but can't be discounted."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "King Cuan",
        "jockey": "Colin Keane",
        "trainer": "P Twomey",
        "ts": "103",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "3320-3",
        "sire": "Tasleet",
        "dam_sire": "Dutch Art",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "62.5",
        "model_pct": "9.2%",
        "fair_odds": "10.83",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-7.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One of two for yard; has won four times at 6f-7f and is 2-2 at this track; sole win last year came in a three-runner auction race at Fairyhouse (6f, good); subsequently placed in Listed and Group 3 company; had a few of these behind when a 3.5l third at Cork (6f, soft) on seasonal return; sharper now but has never won over 5f and Billy Lee prefers Bonus Time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Bonus Time (IRE)",
        "jockey": "W J Lee",
        "trainer": "P Twomey",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "103",
        "or": "91",
        "form": "21210-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Siyouni",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "61.7",
        "model_pct": "8.6%",
        "fair_odds": "11.60",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "One of two for yard; two 6f wins last year, making all to score in a Curragh maiden (good) and a conditions race here (gd-yld); disappointed upped to 7f when last seen at York and loads to find on the figures on her first try at 5f, but interesting that Billy Lee seemingly prefers her to King Cuan."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "ts": "108",

        "fair_odds": "12.05",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Top class 2yo returned from aborted stud career last year and won a C&D Listed race (good) and a Curragh Group 3 (6f, good); fine third in the Group 1 Flying Five before a below-par run at the Breeders' Cup; soft ground not ideal for seasonal reappearance and better expected now; chance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Unique Journey",

        "ts": "96",

        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has won three handicaps at 6f, including one here; not disgraced when fourth in a 6f Cork Listed race on latest, 2.25l behind King Cuan; needs to find a bit more dropped back in trip in the first-time blinkers."

        "spotlight": "Gelded in the off-season and won on seasonal return for the second year running when landing a Curragh handicap (5f, sft-hvy); this is harder and has lots to find on the figures, but he's relatively lightly raced and there could be more to come."

        "spotlight": "1-12 on turf but has had a few near misses, including when beaten a short head in a 5f Curragh handicap (soft) last time; ran well over C&D (yielding) last October, but rated 84 and looks to be up against it in this company."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "3yo filly whose best effort in three runs as a 2yo came when a 1.75l fourth of 23 in the Queen Mary at Royal Ascot; last of seven in a C&D Listed race in July and not seen again until landing a 5f maiden at Cork (soft) 23 days ago; gets all the allowances and that maiden form was boosted at Navan on Saturday."

        "spotlight": "Marvelous veteran showed he retained all his ability when winning for the eleventh time in the Listed Gladness Stakes at the Curragh (7f, sft-hvy) a month ago; however, has come up short in the last three renewals of this race and 5f probably sharp enough for him these days."

        "spotlight": "Five-time winner best with a bit of cut in the ground; sole win last season came in a Listed heat at this venue (6f, yielding); may have needed his comeback at Cork and likes it here, but would probably like to see some rain."

      }

      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two 6f handicaps here last autumn and he is now 4lb lower than for the latter win; more recent efforts leave him with a point to prove but the fitting of a tongue-tie could give him a lift and Silvestre De Sousa is a positive booking."
